name: TORAKAGE

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Ninjutsu
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If an Adaptable token was removed during this action, an ally within 8" may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Erase Their Legacy
triggers.text: Remove all enemy Scheme markers within (r)2" of the target.

triggers.name: Assassinate
triggers.text: After killing, gain a Fast token.

actions.name: Shuriken
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Shadow Pin
triggers.text: Target must be within 3" of a Shadow marker. This action deals +1 damage and the target gains a Stunned token.

actions.name: Grappling Hook
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a model or terrain piece.
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range, in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Get Over Here!
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target is a model, instead of placing this model, move the target up to 4" toward this model.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' characteristic
